items_flat.title_en: Claude Fable 5 returns globally with updated safeguards
items_flat.title_zh: Claude Fable 5 加入新版防護後恢復全球使用
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic restored Fable 5 globally after the export-control pause and added classifiers intended to reduce cybersecurity misuse.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 在出口管制暫停後恢復 Fable 5 全球使用，並加入降低資安濫用風險的新分類器。

items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 開放 Fable 5 推廣存取
items_flat.summary_en: Paid Claude plans received promotional Fable 5 access, with usage-policy details published in Anthropic's support center.
items_flat.summary_zh: Claude 付費方案取得 Fable 5 推廣存取，Anthropic 並在支援中心公布用量政策細節。

anthropic.title_en: Claude Fable 5 returns globally with updated safeguards
anthropic.title_zh: Claude Fable 5 加入新版防護後恢復全球使用
